6.description: collapse to one row per teig (deduplicate)

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
       ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS minx,
       ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS miny,
       ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS maxx,
       ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Stavanger%'
GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn;

1.description: get Stavanger municipality extent and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 agricultural category values within Stavanger extent

3.description: select AR50 polygons for agricultural land clipped to Stavanger extent

4.description: get parcels (teig) in Stavanger with geometry

5.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teigid

7.description: select teigid and objid for output
